creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
gnuplot dumps core when doing the first plot using the wx-widgets terminal.

Here's a backtrace:

Fix: 

Workaround is to use another terminal (X11 works fine).
How-To-Repeat: Compile gnuplot with WX option and do a plot.
